name: DataFormatValidation
label: Data format validation
description: Validates multiple Excel files contained in a ZIP against a JSON configuration file that defines required/optional columns, data types, allowed ranges and regex formats. Produces a plain-text validation log.

parameters.name: stopOnErrors
parameters.label: The WorkFlow stops on critical errors within data templates
parameters.description: When TRUE the wrapper exits with code 1 if any critical validation error is found, allowing the Tesseract workflow to halt. Set to FALSE to always continue and only inspect the log.

inputs.name: input-data
inputs.label: Excel data ZIP
inputs.description: ZIP archive containing one or more Excel workbooks (.xlsx) to be validated. Each workbook must contain a sheet named 'data'. See data example templates to know how to fill these files

inputs.name: input-config
inputs.label: Table configuration
inputs.description: JSON file that defines the validation rules for each table type: schema, critical/optional columns, no-negatives, expected ranges and regex formats.

outputs.name: output-log
outputs.label: Validation log
outputs.description: Plain-text report listing critical errors and warnings per file, or a success message when no issues are found.

outputs.name: output-data
outputs.label: Validated data ZIP
outputs.description: ZIP archive containing the same Excel files as the input, renamed with a 'validated_' prefix to confirm they have passed (or been inspected by) the validation step.

author: LifeWatch ERIC
